name: Solar System
subtitle: The Sun and its eight planets
blurb: A model of our solar system — the Sun at the centre, orbited by Mercury, Venus, Earth (with the Moon), Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune, and Pluto. Tap the Sun to explore it on its own.

name: The Sun
subtitle: The star at the centre of the solar system
blurb: The Sun is the star at the centre of the solar system: a sphere of hot plasma about 1.39 million km across and roughly 4.6 billion years old, generating its energy by nuclear fusion in the core.
